news.headline: Uptick in market volatility raises concerns on Wall Street as economic uncertainty persists.
Vast Renewables Limited reports financial results for first half of FY 2025, ended Dec 31, 2024. Company specializes in CSP energy systems.
news.summary: Based in Sydney, Vast Renewables Limited, trading on Nasdaq as VSTE, reported on its performance for the first half of fiscal 2025, spanning the six months concluding on December 31, 2024. The company focuses on concentrated solar thermal power (CSP) systems, producing carbon-neutral, large-scale electricity and industrial heat. Vast disclosed operational and financial outcomes for this period. Additionally, during this first half of fiscal year 2025, Vast publicized funding commitments.

news.headline: Natural Resource Partners L.P. files 2024 Form 10-K, available online or by request, contact info@nrplp.com.
news.summary: Houston-based Natural Resource Partners L.P. (NYSE: NRP) disclosed the submission of its Annual Report Form 10-K for the period ending December 31, 2024, to the Securities and Exchange Commission. This report can be accessed on the company's website, www.nrplp.com. For hard copies, requests can be made at info@nrplp.com or by reaching out to the partnership at 1415 Louisiana Street, Suite 3325, Houston, TX 77002. Natural Resource Partners focuses on natural resource assets.

news.headline: Fed's Goolsbee: Tariffs can take a long time to impact the economy.
Fed's Goolsbee: The rise in productivity appears real, but we are still unsure how long it will last.
Acadia Realty Trust to present at Citi 2025 Global Property CEO Conference on March 2-5, 2025 in Hollywood, FL, with CEO presenting on March 3 at 5:00 p.m. ET.
news.summary: In Rye, New York, Acadia Realty Trust (NYSE: AKR) revealed plans to take part in the Citi 2025 Global Property CEO Conference from March 2, 2025, to March 5, 2025, in Hollywood, FL. Kenneth F. Bernstein, the President, and CEO of Acadia, is set to deliver a presentation on Monday, March 3, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. ET during the event. Additionally, the company will hold one-on-one meetings with investors throughout the conference.

news.headline: Fed's Goolsbee: We will have to see what exactly happens with tariffs.
Ovation Healthcare releases playbook to optimize hospital operations, aiming for improved performance.
news.summary: In Brentwood, Tennessee, on February 28, 2025, Ovation Healthcare, a leading provider of shared services for enhancing hospital and system performance, unveiled its latest offering. The new resource is a contemporary playbook tailored to assist hospitals in streamlining their operations and reaching peak efficiency.

news.headline: Fed's Goolsbee: We don't have enough clarity to forecast off the Trump agenda yet.
Redwire Corp to announce Q4 & full year 2024 results on March 10, 2025. Earnings call on March 11, 2025 at 9am EDT.
news.summary: Redwire Corporation (NYSE: RDW) based in Jacksonville, Fla., will be releasing its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024, after the market closes on Monday, March 10, 2025. A conference call led by management is scheduled for 9 a.m. EDT on Tuesday, March 11, 2025, to discuss the financial performance during the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. To join the earnings conference call, dial 877-485-3108 (toll-free).

news.headline: Fed's Goolsbee: We should start working through scenarios of trump economic agenda.
Fed's Goolsbee: I am partly concerned about slow growth and inflation risks.
Portuguese Banco Comercial S.A. discloses details of securities transaction.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. This improvement comes as the economy added 250,000 new jobs, surpassing expectations and indicating a positive trend in the labor market. Additionally, the stock market saw a notable increase, with the main index rising by 2.5%. Analysts attribute this growth to strong performances in key sectors such as technology and healthcare. Overall, these figures reflect a promising outlook for the economy and employment landscape.

news.headline: Fed's Goolsbee: We still appear to be on a path back to 2% inflation.
Fed's Goolsbee: Inflation data is still higher than we'd like - CNBC.
Analysts suggest XRP could reach $18,000 per coin based on data. Insights on the potential rally examined by Cointelegraph.
news.summary: A team of experts has indicated that multiple data indicators suggest a potential surge in the value of XRP to $18,000 per coin. An in-depth analysis by Cointelegraph delves into the supporting evidence for this projected rally.

news.headline: Delek Logistics Partners, LP filed its 2024 Form 10-K on February 26, available online for viewing. Limited partners can request a free printed copy.
news.summary: Delek Logistics Partners, LP (NYSE: DKL) based in Brentwood, Tennessee, revealed the submission of its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on February 26, 2025. The report is accessible on the company's website, www.deleklogistics.com, under the “SEC Filings” section. Limited partners can additionally obtain a printed copy at no cost upon written request.

news.headline: Microsoft is retiring Skype on July 31, with over 300 million monthly active users affected by this change.
LZ Technology Holdings Limited closes IPO with 1.8M shares at $4 each, yielding $7.2M. Shares now trading on Nasdaq as "LZMH."
news.summary: In Huzhou City, China, on February 28, 2025, LZ Technology Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: LZMH), a company specializing in information technology and advertising, revealed the completion of its initial public offering. The offering consisted of 1,800,000 Class B ordinary shares priced at $4.00 per share, resulting in total gross proceeds of around $7.2 million, excluding underwriting discounts and additional offering costs. The Company's Class B Ordinary Shares commenced trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market on February 27, 2025, under the ticker symbol "LZMH."

news.headline: BIT Mining Limited released unaudited financial results for Q4 2024, Akron, Ohio.
news.summary: In Akron, Ohio, on February 28, 2025, BIT Mining Limited (NYSE: BTCM), a prominent technology-focused cryptocurrency mining firm, released its unaudited financial performance data for the fourth quarter ending on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Alaska Airlines flight attendants approve new contract; 6,900 staff benefit from pay raise and other enhancements.
news.summary: In Seattle on February 28, 2025, Alaska Airlines announced that their over 6,900 flight attendants, represented by the Association of Flight Attendants (AFA), have approved a new three-year contract. This deal entails various enhancements, such as boosted salaries, for the attendants.

news.headline: FMC Corp (NYSE: FMC) declares quarterly dividend of 58 cents/share, payable on April 17, 2025, to shareholders of record.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, in Philadelphia, it was disclosed that FMC Corporation (NYSE: FMC) declared a standard quarterly dividend of 58 cents per share. This dividend is set to be paid out on April 17, 2025, to shareholders who are officially listed as shareholders by the end of business on March 31, 2025. FMC Corporation is a company that...

news.headline: Principal Real Estate Income Fund (NYSE: PGZ) announces distribution sources of $0.1050 per share to shareholders on Feb 28, 2025.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, the Principal Real Estate Income Fund (NYSE: PGZ) disclosed the sources of a distribution payment of $0.1050 per share to shareholders of record as of February.

news.headline: Beyond Oil has entered the Indian market with a distribution agreement to introduce its frying oil filtration solution to restaurants across the country.
news.summary: A new strategic agreement has been reached to bring Beyond Oil's cutting-edge frying oil filtration solution to restaurants throughout India. The partnership aims to introduce this innovative technology to a large number of restaurants across the country. This collaboration will facilitate the implementation of Beyond Oil's solution in a substantial number of dining establishments, significantly impacting the Indian restaurant industry.

news.headline: EPR Properties CEO Gregory Silvers to present at 2025 Citi Global Property CEO Conference on March 4 at 2:55 PM ET. (Tweet-length summary)
news.summary: The CEO of EPR Properties, identified as Gregory Silvers, is scheduled to speak at the 2025 Citi Global Property CEO Conference on March 4, 2025, at 2:55 PM Eastern Time. EPR Properties is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol EPR. This significant event highlights the company's engagement with industry peers and investors, showcasing their commitment to transparent communication and strategic leadership.

news.headline: NWS suspends weather balloon launches in Kotzebue, AK due to staffing cuts. WindBorne Systems offers to fill data gap.
news.summary: WindBorne Systems, a planetary intelligence company based in Palo Alto, California, has volunteered to offer the National Weather Service (NWS) free atmospheric data as they announced a suspension of weather balloon launches in Kotzebue, Alaska indefinitely due to staffing shortages following recent DOGE activity. The NWS's decision will result in a critical gap in weather observations, but WindBorne Systems aims to help offset this loss. The U.S. currently conducts approximately 100 weather balloon launches.

news.headline: US remains dominant in space with leading technology and capabilities, surpassing all other countries.
Stocks bounced back after Trump's alarming 'World War III' remarks to Zelensky, increasing by 5% within 24 hours.
Stocks surge as investors shrug off Trump-Zelensky controversy, with S&P500 gaining 2.5%, Nasdaq up 3.1%.

Banco Santander, S.A. files 2024 Annual Report on Form 20-F with the SEC. Available online for shareholders and investors.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, Banco Santander, S.A. disclosed the submission of its 2024 Annual Report on Form 20-F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Interested parties can access this form on the company's "Shareholders and Investors" webpage.

news.headline: Spirit AeroSystems reports Q4 2024 revenues of $1.7B, EPS $(5.38), adjusted EPS $(4.22), cash flow $137M, free cash flow $91M.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, Spirit AeroSystems Holdings, Inc., based in Wichita, Kansas, reported revenues of $1.7 billion. The earnings per share (EPS) were $(5.38), while the adjusted EPS* stood at $(4.22). Cash provided by operations amounted to $137 million, with free cash flow* hitting $91 million. Spirit AeroSystems Holdings, Inc. trades on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol SPR.

news.headline: US State Department Spokesperson: Zelenskiy has the chance to turn this around.
Camden Property Trust to participate in Citi’s 2025 conference on March 3 at 2:10 PM EST. Event will be webcast live.
news.summary: Houston-based Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) disclosed its participation in Citi’s 2025 Global Property CEO Conference, with a scheduled roundtable discussion on Monday, March 3, 2025, at 2:10 PM Eastern Time. The event will be live webcast in a listen-only mode on camdenliving.com (Investors section), and an audio archive will be accessible on the Company’s website post-event. Find more information on Camden’s latest updates on their website.

news.headline: Chatham Lodging sets date for 2025 Shareholders Meeting in West Palm Beach, Florida.
news.summary: Chatham Lodging has revealed that the 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders will be held in West Palm Beach, Florida. This event aims to gather shareholders and discuss important company matters. The meeting date will soon be announced to all interested parties. This announcement signifies the company's commitment to transparency and engagement with its shareholders. This annual meeting serves as a platform for shareholders to voice their opinions and concerns, ensuring their involvement in key decisions. Stay tuned for further details on this significant event in Chatham Lodging's calendar.

news.headline: Insteel Industries appoints Eric Zernikow to board of directors with term until 2027. Zernikow served with Nucor Corp for 22 years.
news.summary: Insteel Industries Inc. (NYSE: IIIN) based in Mount Airy, North Carolina, has recently added Eric Zernikow to its board of directors. Zernikow, who has 22 years of experience with Nucor Corporation, the largest steel producer in the U.S., will serve on the Executive Compensation Committee and Nominating and Governance Committee until the 2027 annual meeting of shareholders. This appointment underscores Insteel's strategic focus on bringing in industry experts to drive growth and enhance corporate governance.

news.headline: Pebblebrook Hotel Trust announces winners for 13th Annual Pebby Awards in Hollywood, California.
news.summary: In Hollywood, California, Pebblebrook Hotel Trust has revealed the victors of the 13th Annual Pebby Awards. The event celebrates excellence within the Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) sector. This recognition highlights outstanding achievements in the industry and serves as a prestigious honor for the winners.

news.headline: Essex Property Trust CEO to speak at 2025 Citigroup Global Property CEO Conference on March 3, 2025 at 4:20 pm ET. Visit www.essex.com for webcast details.
news.summary: In San Mateo, California, Essex Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE:ESS) shared that Angela L. Kleiman, President and CEO, will partake in a roundtable discussion at the 2025 Citigroup Global Property CEO Conference in Hollywood, FL on March 3, 2025, at 4:20 p.m. ET. To tune in to the panel, access the webcast link on the Company’s Investors website at www.essex.com. A recording of the webcast will be accessible post-event for those unable to join live.

news.headline: Montrose Environmental Group (NYSE: MEG) to attend Evercore 17th Annual Industrial Conference in Little Rock, Arkansas on Feb. 28, 2025.
news.summary: Montrose Environmental Group, Inc., a company dedicated to environmental protection, will be participating in the Evercore event scheduled for February 28, 2025, in Little Rock, Arkansas. The company, listed on the NYSE as MEG, works towards safeguarding the quality of air, water, and soil.

news.headline: MAA to attend 2025 Citi Global Property CEO Conference; H. Eric Bolton, Jr., CEO to represent.
news.summary: In Germantown, Tennessee on February 28, 2025, Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (NYSE: MAA) shared their participation in the upcoming 2025 Citi Global Property CEO Conference. The company's Chairman and CEO, H. Eric Bolton, Jr., alongside A. Bradley, will represent MAA at the event.

news.headline: AMH to join 2025 Citi Global Property CEO Conference, as a leading single-family rental home company with NYSE: AMH.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on February 28, 2025, AMH (NYSE: AMH) disclosed that its management team will partake in a roundtable discussion as part of the 2025 event. AMH is a prominent player in owning, operating, and developing single-family rental homes on a large scale.

news.headline: Jack Henry CEO Greg Adelson and CFO Mimi Carsley to speak at various conferences soon, as announced by the company.
news.summary: In Monett, Missouri on February 28, 2025, Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (Nasdaq: JKHY) shared plans for President & CEO Greg Adelson and CFO & Treasurer Mimi Carsley to participate in upcoming conferences. Adelson is scheduled to speak at various events in the near future.

news.headline: States may be first to adopt Bitcoin reserves: Report. US Senator Lummis anticipates federal progress to be slower.
news.summary: Senator Cynthia Lummis of the United States anticipates that the advancement towards establishing a Bitcoin reserve at the federal level will be slower.

news.headline: US bank deposits rose to $17.945 tln from $17.895 tln in the prior week.
Range Resources Corporation in Fort Worth increased quarterly dividend by 12.5% to $0.09 per share, payable on March 28, 2025.
news.summary: Fort Worth, Texas, news from February 28, 2025 - Range Resources Corporation (NYSE: RRC) revealed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.09 per common share for Q1. Shareholders of record by March 14, 2025, will receive the dividend on March 28, 2025. This marks a 12.5% boost in Range's quarterly cash dividend, resulting in an annualized dividend of $0.36 per share.

news.headline: American Assets Trust, Inc. (NYSE: AAT) acquires 192-unit Genesee Park Apartments in San Diego.
news.summary: In San Diego on February 28, 2025, American Assets Trust, Inc. (NYSE: AAT) disclosed the completion of the acquisition of Genesee Park, a 192-unit apartment complex in San Diego, California.

news.headline: $11.5 billion in tokenized Real-World Assets currently on-chain. Projected value to reach $16 trillion by 2030 as decentralized finance gains traction. XDC launches first funds in token form with Archax.
news.summary: The tokenized Real-World Assets (RWAs) on-chain currently amount to $11.5 billion, with projections suggesting a potential growth to $16 trillion by 2030. As institutional-grade decentralized finance becomes more popular, traditional investment instruments are shifting to blockchain for enhanced liquidity, quicker settlements, and decreased operational expenses. XDC has introduced the initial funds on its platform in tokenized format in partnership with Archax, a FCA-regulated digital asset exchange, broker, and custodian. For more information, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Access Medical Labs in Jupiter, Florida confirms Elizabeth Holmes' exact Pfizer study results using the same components, reshaping the conversation around Theranos.
news.summary: A recent announcement in Jupiter, Florida on February 28, 2025 has turned heads as one of the biggest Specialty Labs in the Nation revealed that Elizabeth Holmes' diagnostic technology at Theranos was indeed accurate. This revelation is set to transform the discussions surrounding Holmes and her endeavors. The confirmation that her technology was reliable comes as a significant breakthrough in the ongoing scrutiny over her work. The specific numbers regarding the accuracy rates and impact of this revelation were not disclosed.

news.headline: John Hancock Tax-Advantaged Dividend Income Fund announces sources of monthly distribution for shareholders.
news.summary: In Boston on February 28, 2025, John Hancock Tax-Advantaged Dividend Income Fund, traded on NYSE under the symbol HTD, revealed details of its monthly dividends. The Fund, managed by John Hancock Investment Management LLC with subadvisory services by Manulife Investment Management (US) LLC, disclosed the origins of its monthly income.
